data.title: Hospice Care Expert Cindy Mensik discusses when families should consider hospice care in Texas City, TX.
data.description: A recent article published by HelloNation sheds light on the appropriate time for families in Texas City, TX, to start contemplating hospice care for their loved ones. The piece, which includes input from Cindy Mensik of Better Care Matters, delves into this crucial decision. It discusses important factors to consider such as the patient's physical condition and provides guidelines on when hospice care might be suitable. Residents of Texas City are encouraged to read the informative article for valuable insights on this topic.

data.title: Stock market today: Dow Jones up, Nasdaq rising, airline stock soaring - live coverage from Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Today, there was a positive movement in the stock market as the Dow Jones index saw an increase, while the Nasdaq composite outperformed. The airline sector also experienced growth, with one airline company's stock soaring. The live coverage on Investor's Business Daily provided updates on the market performance.

data.title: Beauty incubator Maesa launches fragrance brand Scents Unearth'd, focusing on unique scents from worldwide cultures.
data.description: In February 17, 2026, Maesa, a leading beauty incubator, announced further growth in its fragrance line with the launch of Scents Unearth'd. This new brand aims to showcase unique scent narratives inspired by diverse cultures, individuals, and ingredients globally. The initiative seeks to take consumers on a journey to explore unconventional fragrance profiles and deepen appreciation for different olfactory experiences.

data.title: The Picklr to open their third Indianapolis location in late spring 2026 in Avon, Indiana, continuing their expansion.
data.description: A renowned indoor pickleball franchise in North America is expanding with a third location in Indianapolis, set to open in late spring 2026. The Picklr, known as the fastest-growing indoor pickleball brand in North America, disclosed details about its upcoming club in Avon, Indiana, located just west of Indianapolis. The new venture in Avon marks the latest addition to the franchise's portfolio, reinforcing its position as a premier destination for pickleball enthusiasts. The expansion into Indianapolis demonstrates the brand's commitment to growth and meeting the increasing demand for indoor pickleball facilities.

data.title: Granum and Weathermatic partner to improve contractor performance in green industry. Strategic partnership announced on Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: A partnership between Granum, the company responsible for LMN and Greenius, and Weathermatic, a leading smart irrigation solutions provider, was unveiled today in San Antonio on Feb. 17, 2026. The partnership aims to enhance contractor performance through synchronized leadership. This multi-year strategic collaboration will involve a significant investment from both companies and is set to bring cutting-edge innovations to the industry. The specific duration and financial details of the partnership were not disclosed.

data.title: Lam Research opens new office in Boise, Idaho to support US semiconductor growth; marks three decades in the city.
data.description: Senator Risch, along with community leaders and Micron, commemorated the opening of Lam Research Corp.'s new office in Boise, Idaho. The ceremony took place on Feb. 17, 2026, marking Lam's continued presence in the 'City of Trees'. The event celebrated Lam's three decades in Idaho and showcased their investment in the community. Lam Research Corp. (NASDAQ: LRCX) emphasized their commitment to growth and innovation, underscoring the importance of the new office.

data.title: Bayer to pay $7.25B to settle Roundup cases alleging weedkiller causes lymphoma, pending legal approval.
data.description: An agreement is being proposed to potentially settle current and future claims alleging that a weedkiller is linked to cases of non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. However, this agreement is still subject to legal challenges.

data.title: Rooter Hero hosts "Spread the Love" pop-up event at Cultivate Coffee in Phoenix on Feb 19 at 8 AM, offering kindness to first 50 attendees.
data.description: Rooter Hero is encouraging the Phoenix community to kick off their day with a dash of kindness at the "Spread the Love" pop-up event on Thursday, February 19, from 8:00 AM onwards at Cultivate Coffee. The event will host the first 50 attendees in line who will have the chance to participate in various festivities and receive complimentary goodies.

data.title: WorldVue partners with Preferred Hotels & Resorts, offering in-room entertainment/wifi. Strengthening global presence for 700 properties.
data.description: In Houston, WorldVue has revealed its integration with Preferred Hotels & Resorts to join its Alliance Partner Program. This collaboration establishes WorldVue as a trusted provider for in-room entertainment and WiFi services for Preferred Hotels & Resorts' member properties worldwide. Preferred Hotels & Resorts, known for its commitment to providing guests with unique experiences, operates a global portfolio. This partnership will bring WorldVue's services to a wide network of hotels within the Preferred Hotels & Resorts brand.

data.title: First Farmers Financial Corp. approved $4 million stock buyback program, replaces old program of $3.95 million.
data.description: In Converse, Indiana, on February 17, 2026, First Farmers Financial Corp. (OTCQX: FFMR) disclosed that its Board of Directors has given the green light to a fresh stock repurchase initiative. This program enables the company to repurchase a maximum of $4 million worth of its common stock through open market transactions. This new program supersedes the previous authorization from April 2025, during which the company effectively bought back a total of 59,173 shares amounting to $3.95 million over the span of ten months.

data.title: Start-stop feature credit ended by Trump admin for car manufacturers, reducing emissions standards by eliminating engine stops at red lights.
data.description: Manufacturers are no longer eligible to receive a credit towards meeting vehicle emissions standards by incorporating engines that automatically shut off at red lights.

data.title: ADP jobs report surpasses expectations, impacting Fed outlook; S&P 500 remains stable. Rate cut uncertainty persists for December.
data.description: There is uncertainty regarding a December rate cut. Following the ADP Jobs Report surpassing expectations, the Federal Reserve's outlook has become unclear. The S&P 500 remains stable amidst these developments.

data.title: GRT reveals ambitious 2026 plan for AI and institutions, offering new data services on Horizon protocol.
data.description: The Graph has unveiled its detailed technical roadmap for 2026, marking a significant expansion beyond subgraphs to cater to AI agents, enterprises, and the DeFi sector. The roadmap includes the introduction of new data services on the Horizon protocol. This move signifies a strategic shift in the company's focus, aiming to enhance its offerings to a wider range of users. This development is expected to have a substantial impact on the industry, with experts predicting a surge in adoption and utilization.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin remain stagnant. Bitcoin at $67,989.66, Ethereum at $1,999.07, XRP at $1.48, Dogecoin at $0.1020. 83,760 traders liquidated in 24 hours, losing $196.52 million. Net inflows of $15.2 million to spot Bitcoin ETFs on Friday. Top losers:pippin, MYX Finance, and Quant in the past 24 hours.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently hovering around the $68,000 level amid a softening market and prevailing fear among traders. The latest cryptocurrency ticker prices are Bitcoin at $67,989.66, Ethereum at $1,999.07, Solana at $85.11, XRP at $1.48, Dogecoin at $0.1020, and Shiba Inu at $0.05667. Recent data reveals that 83,760 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, resulting in losses totaling $196.52 million. Moreover, there were net inflows of $15.2 million from spot Bitcoin ETFs and $10.3 million from spot Ethereum ETFs on Friday. Some of the top losers in the last day were pippin, MYX Finance, and Quant. Additionally, Cathie Wood has weighed in on the factors driving Bitcoin's recent drop. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bitdeer surpasses MARA in self-mining hash rate, says JPMorgan. Publicly traded companies compared.
data.description: JPMorgan analysts revealed that Bitdeer, a Bitcoin miner, has exceeded MARA in self-mining hash rate among publicly traded companies. This significant development showcases Bitdeer’s growing influence in the industry.
